head.hi: The Secretary of State to the Embassy in France

div.p:
21. Newsweek Jan 6 stated that though news not yet announced, US has already taken steps halt fighting Indochina and that last week BonnetHenri Bonnet, French Ambassador. was called in by Dept and told that (1) Indochinese
settlement imperative, (2) affair could be brought up UN any time by any power and that US would not necessarily support France, (3) that US wishes ensure no lend-lease weapons being used suppress Vietnam and suspects they are being used, and (4) MoffatAbbot Low Moffat, Chief of the Division of Southeast Asian Affairs. is in area and would be glad assist both sides.
For your info, of four numbered statements, three and one-half completely false. Only element truth was fact ActSecy suggested dispute might be brought up UN by third power.

Dept replying press queries that ActSecy discussed Indochina with Bonnet Dec 23 (Deptel 6586 Dec 24
Foreign Relations, 1946, vol. viii, p. 77.). Tenor his remarks made public press conf Dec 27. (Radio bulletin No. 309). To this Dept has nothing add except statement Newsweek story pure specimen think-piece. You may make similar reply queries.
